description: Redesign SIM section: replace single jenisSim/nomorSim/dokumenSIM with per-type SIM A/B/C rows, each with checkbox, nomor, and upload fields
steps: In src/app/candidate/form/page.js, replace jenisSim, nomorSim, dokumenSIM fields in formData with simA, nomorSimA, dokumenSimA, simB, nomorSimB, dokumenSimB, simC, nomorSimC, dokumenSimC
Update handleChange cleanup logic for memilikiSim to clear all new SIM fields
Replace the current SIM section JSX with three separate rows for SIM A, SIM B, SIM C, each with a checkbox/toggle, nomor field, and upload field
Update admin/edit page to use new SIM fields
Update admin/import page to use new SIM fields
acceptance_criteria: When memilikiSim = YA, three rows are shown for SIM A, SIM B, SIM C
Each row has a YA/TIDAK toggle, Nomor SIM field, and Upload field
Old jenisSim, nomorSim, dokumenSIM fields are removed from formData initial state
New fields simA/nomorSimA/dokumenSimA, simB/nomorSimB/dokumenSimB, simC/nomorSimC/dokumenSimC are in formData
handleChange clears all new SIM fields when memilikiSim changes to TIDAK
verification: Run npm run build to confirm no compilation errors
findings: Build passes successfully. Updated three files: candidate form page (formData state, handleChange, JSX), admin edit page (SIM field inputs), and admin import page (SIM field parsing logic from spreadsheet). No test suite configured, verification via npm run build only.
